title: QFINHUB Linkable Asset #2 — Debt Snowball vs Avalanche Comparison Widget
selection: OPTION A: Debt Snowball vs Avalanche Embed/Widget
selection_rationale: 74K+ monthly searches for 'snowball vs avalanche' (high-demand topic)
Builds on existing debt-payoff and credit-card-payoff calculators (reuse logic)
Embeddable widget = natural backlink magnet for PF blogs
Side-by-side comparison is inherently shareable and link-worthy
Lower build effort than original research (Option C) — can ship in 1-2 days
Directly serves personal finance bloggers' audiences (natural outreach fit)
Competitor widgets are weak — opportunity to build the best comparison tool

rejected_options.B_Emergency_Fund_Calculator_Widget: Competitive space (NerdWallet, Bankrate have strong widgets). Lower differentiation.
rejected_options.C_Homebuyer_Affordability_Checklist: Asset #1 already covers mortgage affordability embed. Checklist format has lower backlink value.
rejected_options.D_Retirement_Readiness_Checklist: Checklist format less likely to earn backlinks than interactive calculator.
rejected_options.E_Calculator_Directory: Directory pages have low backlink value. QFINHUB already has /calculators listing.

asset_spec.name: Debt Snowball vs Avalanche Comparison Widget
asset_spec.target_audience: Personal finance bloggers, debt-free community, credit counselors, FIRE bloggers, financial literacy educators
asset_spec.why_can_earn_links: Interactive side-by-side comparison of the two most popular debt payoff methods. Shows personalized payoff date and total interest for BOTH methods using the user's actual debt numbers. PF bloggers write about this topic constantly — a free embeddable tool saves them from building their own.
outreach_angle: "Your debt payoff article is great — want to embed our free snowball vs avalanche calculator so readers can compare THEIR actual numbers?"
"Debt-free community: Embed this free comparison tool so your readers can see exactly which method saves them more money."
"Financial literacy educators: Free interactive classroom tool to teach debt repayment strategies."
build_steps: 1. Extract debt-payoff calculation logic into reusable module
3. Build landing page (/widgets/debt-snowball-vs-avalanche-embed) — indexable with embed code
4. Add side-by-side comparison: snowball method vs avalanche method, showing payoff date + total interest for each
5. Add debt input form (list of debts with balance, rate, minimum payment)
6. Add visual comparison chart (bar chart: total interest saved, months faster)
8. Add widget share packet (same pattern as asset #1)
9. Add to sitemap, internal links from debt-payoff and credit-card-payoff
asset_spec.expected_backlink_value: HIGH — debt payoff is the #1 personal finance search topic. Snowball vs avalanche articles are evergreen link targets. One placement on a DR50+ PF blog generates significant authority.
asset_spec.auditor_risk_notes: Very low risk. Builds on proven debt-payoff calculator logic (already indexed, STRONG cluster). No new data sources needed. Widget pattern already proven with asset #1.
asset_spec.recommended_build_date: 2026-06-08 (48h after Phase 16.10 to allow current CTR fixes to settle)
post_build_actions: Submit to GSC UI for indexing
Add internal links from all debt-related pages (7 STRONG cluster calculators)
Target first outreach batch immediately after verification
